extension.summary: Install Shield shortcuts for Fen Light rescrape/source select
extension.description: Helper that installs a Kodi keymap and runs Fen Light rescrape/source select for the focused AH2 movie or episode item.
extension.news:
v0.0.6 - Make the helper installable on all Kodi platforms so famYT keymap dependencies can resolve on Mac as well as Android.
v0.0.5 - Add AH2 search and TMDbHelper result window support.
v0.0.4 - Add package artwork.
